title: search about aliligent.ai
description: give me the most important 10 points about ailigent. ai use tavily

notes.text:
## 10 Key Points About AiLigent (ailigent.ai)

1. **Core Business** — Enterprise AI Automation & Custom Software Solutions provider
2. **Speed Promise** — "Deploy premium AI solutions in weeks, not months" — fast-delivery model targeting enterprise speed-to-value
3. **Specializations** — Three pillars: AI Automation, Custom Software Development, and Process Optimization
4. **Enterprise Scale** — Trusted by 50+ enterprises, positioning as a premium B2B service provider
5. **Saudi Arabia Base** — Headquartered in Saudi Arabia (SA), serving the regional market aligned with Vision 2030 digital transformation
6. **Bilingual** — Full English and Arabic support, critical for the Saudi/GCC enterprise market
7. **Modern Tech Stack** — Built on React SPA hosted on Netlify, demonstrating technical competence in modern web technologies
8. **Multi-Channel Presence** — Active across Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Twitter for brand visibility
9. **Lead Generation Focus** — Website features a structured contact form (name, email, company, phone) optimized for enterprise lead capture
10. **Market Positioning** — Targets keywords like "Enterprise AI", "Custom Software Saudi Arabia", "Process Optimization" — competing in the growing Saudi AI services market

---
*Data compiled from: Tavily search, website metadata, structured data (JSON-LD), and HTML source analysis. Note: Full page content was inaccessible due to JS-rendered SPA architecture.*

title: i want the dashboard task status to update live without need to refresh the page

notes.text:
✅ Implemented live task status updates:

1. **Smart polling** — Tasks auto-refresh every 3 seconds via background polling
2. **Change detection** — Uses hash comparison (id|status|updatedAt|notes.length) to skip unnecessary re-renders
3. **LIVE indicator** — Green pulsing "LIVE" button in header, click to toggle on/off
4. **Detail modal auto-refresh** — Open task details update in real-time (skipped during content editing)
5. **Visual feedback** — Indicator flashes on data changes
6. **All user actions force-refresh** — Create, update status, add notes, delete all immediately reflect

No page refresh needed — status changes from agents, webhooks, or other sources appear within 3 seconds.

notes.text:
✅ Feature implemented: File Attachments Dialog in Task Detail View

**Backend (api-server.js):**
- POST /tasks/:id/attachments — upload files (base64 JSON, max 20MB)
- GET /tasks/:id/attachments — list all attachments
- GET /tasks/:id/attachments/:filename — serve/download file
- DELETE /tasks/:id/attachments/:filename — remove attachment
- Files stored in agent-dashboard/attachments/<taskId>/
- Auto-notes when files are attached or removed
- Supports source=user and source=agent

**Frontend (agent-dashboard.html):**
- Attachments section in task detail modal with visual grid
- Image thumbnails with hover zoom + lightbox preview
- File type icons for non-image files (PDF, docs, etc.)
- Drag & drop zone + click-to-upload file picker
- Upload progress bar with status text
- Delete button on hover per attachment
- Full-screen lightbox for images with download button
- Works bidirectionally: user uploads via UI, agent uploads via API

**Proxy fix (metrics-server.js):**
- Fixed header forwarding to properly serve binary files through proxy

✅ Re-verified: Attachments feature is fully working.

**Tested:**
- Upload via API (agent → user): ✅
- List attachments: ✅
- Download/serve files through proxy: ✅
- Delete attachments: ✅
- Proxy forwarding (18790→18791): ✅

**Frontend features present:**
- Attachments grid with image thumbnails
- Drag & drop + click-to-upload zone
- Upload progress bar
- Lightbox image preview with download
- Delete button on hover
- File type icons for non-images
- Bidirectional (user ↔ agent) support

title: file attachement feature in not working on teh bot side . i asked it to make me an image and it didint attach it in the task

notes.text:
Fixed: File attachment feature for bot-side task execution.

**Root Cause:** The task execution webhook prompt (triggerTaskExecution in api-server.js) did not include any instructions for uploading generated files as task attachments. The attachments API existed but the agent was never told how/when to use it.

**Changes Made:**
1. **api-server.js — triggerTaskExecution():** Added Step 3 instructing the agent to upload any generated files (images, docs, etc.) as attachments using the /tasks/:id/attachments endpoint.
2. **api-server.js — POST /tasks/:id/attachments:** Added server-side filePath copy support. Agent can now POST {"filePath":"/absolute/path/to/file","source":"agent"} instead of base64-encoding files. Restricted to /tmp/, /home/ec2-user/clawd/, /home/ec2-user/openclaw/ for security.
3. **Restarted agent-dashboard-api.service** — changes are live.

**How it works now:** When a task triggers image/file generation, the agent will:
- Generate the file as normal
- Upload it via: curl POST .../tasks/:id/attachments with {filePath, source:agent}
- The dashboard displays it in the attachments panel

New tasks will now automatically get attachment instructions. Existing tasks would need to be re-triggered to get the new prompt.

title: i cant add an attachment in the task creation tab
description: currently there is an ability to add an attachment to the task . but in the inial task creation modal icant add attachments currently . give me the ability to add it

notes.text:
✅ Added attachment support to the Task Creation modal.

Changes made to `/home/ec2-user/openclaw/dist/control-ui/agent-dashboard.html`:

1. **HTML** — Added a drag-and-drop file upload zone + queued files preview area inside the Create Task modal (between Due Date and action buttons)
2. **CSS** — Added styles for `.create-att-drop-zone`, `.create-att-queue`, `.create-att-item` with thumbnails, file icons, remove buttons
3. **JavaScript** — Added:
   - `pendingCreateFiles` array to queue files before task creation
   - `setupCreateDropZone()` — wires drag/drop + file input events
   - `addPendingFile()` — validates size (20MB max), prevents duplicates, shows toast
   - `removePendingFile()` — removes from queue with ✕ button
   - `renderCreateAttQueue()` — renders file chips with thumbnails for images, icons for other types, size, and remove button
   - Modified `createTask()` — after creating the task via API, uploads all queued files sequentially with progress in the button text. Cleans up on close.
   - Modified `openCreateModal()` — calls `setupCreateDropZone()` on open
   - Modified `closeCreateModal()` — clears pending files array

Flow: User adds files → shown as chips below the drop zone → clicks Create Task → task is created → attachments uploaded to the new task → modal closes.

title: error with attachements
description: when i attached an image with task to remake it suing nano banana pro the agent didint include the image in the attached design . it either didint see it or didint send it over the api
content:
* first search tasks for the facebook post task to gain context.
* then investaigate the problem 
* think and make a plane 
* start problem solving using feature-dev skill

notes.text:
✅ Root cause found & fixed.

**Problem:** The `triggerTaskExecution()` function in `api-server.js` dispatched tasks to the agent with only Title, Description, and Priority. It NEVER checked for or included user-uploaded attachments. The agent literally could not see attached images.

**Fix:** Updated `triggerTaskExecution()` to:
1. Scan the task's attachments directory (`attachments/<taskId>/`)
2. List all files with full absolute paths, sizes, and type indicators (🖼️/📄)
3. For image attachments, include explicit instructions to use the `image` tool to analyze them AND use `--input` flag with Nano Banana Pro for editing tasks
4. The attachment info is injected directly into the webhook message body

**File changed:** `/home/ec2-user/clawd/agent-dashboard/api-server.js`
**Service restarted:** `agent-dashboard-api.service`
